text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is the year's Grand Prix. Even
people who normally don't watch races often
tune in for this one, it's practically a year-end
tradition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Horsegirls who define the year, horsegirls with
immense popularity… many of the sport's
biggest names gather for this race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And among them, Buena Vista, making her first appearance, had once again taken first place in The 1st's popularity poll.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yeah… I'm grateful, but I never expected it'd
happen at the Arima Kinen too.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I mean… Journey's running, and there are so
many incredible horsegirls here.
choice_data_list: The Japan Cup might've influenced it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the recent Japan Cup, Vodka became the
first Japanese Tiara horsegirl to win the race.
And now…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps people see her, who made such
a huge impact on this year's Triple Tiara
campaign, as the one who'll carry that
momentum forward.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"Buena Vista's going to be the next Vodka!
No, she might even surpass her… She's a
strong Tiara horsegirl!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"The first classic-class Tiara horsegirl to win
the Arima Kinen in ages! I've seen the future,
so trust me on this one."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Huh!? This person saw the future…!?
choice_data_list: That's just how much they're hoping for it.
That's just how much they're hoping for it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I see… Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I want to live up to that. Not just today…
I want to put all my gratitude for all the
support everyone gave me up until now.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm off then!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen draws enormous attention.
Which means she'll be exposed to even more
excitement than ever before. There's a chance
it could affect her heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Especially with it being a Grand Prix race… The feeling of wanting to do this for everyone has probably grown even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hehe… thanks for worrying about me.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
But I think I'll be okay. I can tell… everyone's
expectations are at my back, pushing me
forward!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: So if anything… maybe you're the one who needs a deep breath, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
You've got a wrinkle right here between your
eyebrows… come on, give me your hand.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ready? …Inhale… and exhale…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Mhm. Feeling a little better?
choice_data_list: …Sorry. I'm supposed to be the trainer.
…Sorry. I'm supposed to be the trainer.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
That makes me happy. It means you're putting
your whole heart into this too.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
So be your usual wonderful self… and watch
over me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Ah! It's Buena Vista!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Buena Vistaaaaa!!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
"You'll be fine!"
"We know you can do it…!"

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
"It doesn't matter who's running or what the
track's like!"
"We believe in you, Buena!"

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Go get 'em～!!
Good luck, Buena Vista…!!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During the Triple Tiara campaign, the expectations around her often felt like winning is a given.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But now, what people are placing on her is a
belief that she can make something happen…
a hope for the future. And that passion burns
even hotter.
choice_data_list: (But it'll be fine. Buena can handle it now…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(I'm really grateful. Honestly… today's
excitement feels so good!)

text_block_list.name: Unicarize
text_block_list.text: …Looks like you're in high spirits.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …! Everyone…!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The one who called out to Buena Vista was
Unicarize, winner of the Satsuki Sho.
Alongside Sansha Sangyo, winner of the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And At the Crest, who had recently competed
in the Japan Cup. …Rivals who all shared the
same debut race.

text_block_list.name: Unicarize
text_block_list.text:
Hey there. I'm glad we've all managed to
gather like this again.

text_block_list.name: At the Crest
text_block_list.text:
Seriously! I'm not losing today, got it? And
then we'll make our make debut even more
legendary!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you're right! Let's make it legendary!

text_block_list.name: Sansha Sangyo
text_block_list.text:
Buena, I've been keeping a very close eye on
your success～

text_block_list.name: Sansha Sangyo
text_block_list.text:
I managed to leave my mark by winning the
Kikuka Sho as well～ Let's both give it
everything we've got out there～

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yes! I'm not losing to any of you either!

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: …Hm.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: How naive.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
As always, the cheers for you are…
tremendous. I can hear them all the way from
here.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yes, really… I'm so grateful for them!

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: …So that's how you receive them.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
You truly are a strange person. Soft-hearted.
Easily moved, like a young girl.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
And yet, you never waver. In fact, your
foundation is remarkably strong…

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
Which is precisely why… I find myself wanting
to know.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
If I were to cover over that brilliance of
yours… what kind of scenery would I see then?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …? Journey…?

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. You see, Buena… I've been
looking forward to today very much.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: So please, go easy on me. Well then…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Wait!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Can I ask something too? There's something
I'd like to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: …What is it?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Would you like to take a deep breath?

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: …Excuse me?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Sorry if I'm wrong! But Journey… it feels like
you're a little worked up today.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
This is a special race, after all. And because
it is… I want everyone to be able to run at
their very best.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
You too, Journey. I don't want you to have
any regrets… what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: Of course. You really are… that kind of person.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
……I'll decline. But do take care of yourself
as well.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I will! Let's both do our best out there!
